title: Add optional blinking animation for page title text

requirements.text: Add a reusable CSS animation for blinking text (including a reduced-motion safe behavior) and expose it as a simple class name that can be applied to headings.

quotes: can I ask can be produced output that animate text like blinking the title text?

acceptanceCriteria: A new blink animation exists in the global styles (e.g., in frontend/src/index.css) as a class that can be applied to any element.
When the user has prefers-reduced-motion enabled, the blinking animation is disabled (no blinking occurs).

requirements.text: Update the PageHeader component to support an optional blinking title mode, without changing existing pages by default.

quotes: can I ask can be produced output that animate text like blinking the title text?

acceptanceCriteria: PageHeader accepts a new optional prop (e.g., blinkTitle?: boolean) that defaults to false.
When blinkTitle is true, the <h1> title in PageHeader uses the blink animation class and visibly blinks.
When blinkTitle is false or omitted, the title renders exactly as it does currently (no animation).

constraints: Do not modify files listed as immutable in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui).
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Do not add new admin panels or backend settings for controlling the animation.
Do not apply blinking to every page title automatically; it must be opt-in per usage.
